title: Quararibea inaequalis
taxonomy: Quararibea inaequalis is classified within the family Ochnaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the polypetalous family. This family is part of the order Malpighiales, a large and diverse order of flowering plants. Within the family Ochnaceae, Quararibea inaequalis is placed in the genus Quararibea, which consists of approximately 60 species of trees and shrubs. The genus Quararibea is further divided into two subgenera: Quararibea and Phyllarthron. Quararibea inaequalis, specifically, is native to Central and South America.
